skills.desc: Administers a potent draught, boosting an ally's agility and strength.

skills.name: Antidote Expertise
skills.desc: Mastery of antidotes, granting the party increased resistance to all debuffs.

skills.name: Alchemical Fire
skills.desc: Hurls a flask of alchemical fire, dealing damage to an enemy.

skills.name: Emergency Supplies
skills.desc: Always prepared, occasionally providing a small emergency heal to the party.

skills.name: Headshot
skills.desc: A perfectly aimed shot dealing immense damage, often critical.

skills.name: Marked for Death
skills.desc: Designates an enemy, causing them to take increased damage from all sources.

skills.name: Precision Training
skills.desc: Years of training grant unmatched precision, boosting critical chance and damage.

skills.name: Quickdraw
skills.desc: A lightning-fast draw and shot, dealing moderate damage quickly.

skills.name: Unflinching Focus
skills.desc: Focuses intently, allowing attacks to bypass a portion of enemy defense.

skills.name: Pack Rat
skills.desc: Increased health and luck from collected trinkets.

skills.name: Barter Savvy
skills.desc: Gains bonus gold after each combat encounter.

skills.name: Junk Toss
skills.desc: Hurl collected items at an enemy, dealing varied damage.

skills.name: Deep Pockets
skills.desc: Increased inventory space, leading to minor stat boosts.

skills.name: Emergency Stash
skills.desc: Consume a stored item for a powerful self-heal.

skills.name: Divine Intervention
skills.desc: Randomly heal an ally or damage an enemy with divine power.

skills.name: Second Chance
skills.desc: Low chance to fully revive a fallen ally.

skills.name: Blessing of the Fates
skills.desc: Bestow a temporary, powerful, random stat buff on an ally.

skills.name: Holy Aura
skills.desc: Allies gain minor health regeneration over time.

skills.name: Cleansing Wave
skills.desc: Cleanse all negative effects from the entire party.

skills.name: Predatory Instinct
skills.desc: Increased critical hit chance and damage against vulnerable foes.

skills.name: Pounce
skills.desc: Leap onto a foe, dealing massive damage and a crushing blow.

skills.name: Trophy Hunter
skills.desc: Gains permanent strength after defeating an enemy.

skills.name: Mark Prey
skills.desc: Mark a target, increasing all damage taken by them.

skills.name: Blood Feast
skills.desc: Regenerates health after landing a killing blow.

skills.name: Shadow Step
skills.desc: High evasion chance and critical hit chance while unseen.

skills.name: Backstab
skills.desc: Strike from the shadows, dealing bonus critical damage.

skills.name: Venomous Strike
skills.desc: Basic attacks have a chance to apply a damaging poison debuff.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.desc: Vanish from sight, gaining temporary evasion and cleansing debuffs.

skills.name: Pickpocket
skills.desc: Steals a small amount of gold from defeated enemies.

skills.name: Golden Touch
skills.desc: Generates bonus gold after each combat encounter.

skills.name: Bribe
skills.desc: Bribe an enemy, temporarily charming them to fight for you.

skills.name: Asset Management
skills.desc: Allies gain a small stat boost for every 1000 gold owned.

skills.name: Corporate Sponsorship
skills.desc: Invest in equipment, granting a temporary party-wide defense buff.

skills.name: Hostile Takeover
skills.desc: Recovers health and mana when an ally is defeated.

skills.name: Hearty Stock
skills.desc: Increased health and natural regeneration.

skills.name: Healing Herbs
skills.desc: Plant a healing herb, restoring health to the lowest ally.

skills.name: Earth Bond
skills.desc: Allies gain bonus defense from natural environments.

skills.name: Scarecrow Distraction
skills.desc: Deploy a scarecrow, drawing enemy aggro and protecting allies.

skills.name: Bountiful Harvest
skills.desc: Harvests extra resources from defeated foes.

skills.name: Loyal Companion
skills.desc: Summons a loyal animal companion to fight alongside.

skills.name: Coordinated Assault
skills.desc: Command beast to attack, dealing focused damage with you.

skills.name: Pack Leader
skills.desc: Beasts gain increased stats for every Beastmaster level.

skills.name: Feral Roar
skills.desc: Inspires all animal allies to enrage, boosting their power.

skills.name: Animal Bond
skills.desc: Heals a percentage of health when a summoned beast is defeated.

skills.name: Elemental Infusion
skills.desc: Basic attacks have a chance to apply elemental debuffs.

skills.name: Warding Rune
skills.desc: Engrave a defensive rune, granting temporary shield to an ally.

skills.name: Arcane Flow
skills.desc: Gains bonus mana regeneration from elemental damage dealt.

skills.name: Power Glyph
skills.desc: Carve a potent offensive rune, empowering your next attack.

skills.name: Elemental Resistance
skills.desc: Allies gain increased resistance to elemental damage.

skills.name: Triage
skills.desc: Swiftly heal the lowest health ally significantly.

skills.name: Sterilization Protocol
skills.desc: Allies are immune to most debuffs.

skills.name: Stim-Pack
skills.desc: Grant an ally temporary attack and speed boost.

skills.name: Field Medic
skills.desc: Every turn, the lowest health ally receives a small heal.

skills.name: Defibrillate
skills.desc: Revive a fallen ally with partial health.

skills.name: Culinary Prep
skills.desc: Prepares a random buffing dish at the start of combat.

skills.name: Gourmet Feast
skills.desc: Serve a delicious meal, healing all allies.

skills.name: Food Poisoning
skills.desc: Enemies struck by chef's attacks suffer damage over time.

skills.name: Spice Bomb
skills.desc: Throw a pungent spice bomb, debuffing enemy defense.

skills.name: Self-Serve
skills.desc: Gains bonus stats after consuming one of own dishes.

skills.name: Void Step
skills.desc: Teleports, deals damage, and reduces enemy defense. Strikes from the shadows.

skills.name: Shadow Embrace
skills.desc: Briefly gains defense after being hit. Embraces the darkness.

skills.name: Entropy Drain
skills.desc: Siphons enemy life force, restoring own health. A dark bargain.

skills.name: Oblivion Gaze
skills.desc: Confuses foes, increasing miss chance. Gaze into the void.

skills.name: Void Anchor
skills.desc: Roots enemy, dealing damage over time. Anchored to the abyss.

skills.name: Bulwark Stance
skills.desc: Improves defenses and max health. A steadfast protector, unyielding.

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.desc: Bashes enemy with shield, dealing damage and stunning them momentarily.

skills.name: Divine Aegis
skills.desc: Shields lowest health ally, absorbing damage. Divine protection granted.

skills.name: Unyielding Resolve
skills.desc: Increases defense significantly when below 30% health. Never surrender!

skills.name: Challenging Roar
skills.desc: Taunts all enemies, forcing their attacks. Protects the vulnerable.

skills.name: Sweeping Strike
skills.desc: Swings halberd in wide arc, damaging multiple foes. Clears the way.

skills.name: Impale
skills.desc: Impales enemy, dealing massive damage and causing them to bleed.

skills.name: Polearm Mastery
skills.desc: Enhances weapon attacks, increasing damage and critical chance.

skills.name: Staggering Blow
skills.desc: Regular attacks sometimes stun enemies. Disrupts enemy formations.

skills.name: Phalanx Formation
skills.desc: Forms a defensive line, boosting nearby allies' defense. Holds the line!

skills.name: Marked Shot
skills.desc: Marks target, increasing damage taken. Pinpoint accuracy.

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.desc: Blends into environment, improving evasion and reducing target priority.

skills.name: Caltrop Trap
skills.desc: Deploys caltrops, damaging and slowing enemies. Area denial.

skills.name: Keen Eyesight
skills.desc: Sharpens senses, improving critical strike chance and overall accuracy.

skills.name: First Aid
skills.desc: Applies quick bandages, healing an ally. Essential field medic.

skills.name: Elemental Infusion
skills.desc: Infuses ally with elemental power, boosting attack or defense.

skills.name: Alchemical Vapors
skills.desc: Unleashes noxious vapors, damaging foes and weakening their stats.

skills.name: Stone Skin
skills.desc: Hardens skin, increasing resilience and maximum health. Durable and tough.

skills.name: Rejuvenating Ooze
skills.desc: Emits healing aura, restoring health to self and allies over time.

skills.name: Shifting Form
skills.desc: Temporarily shifts form, greatly boosting either attack or defense.

skills.name: Arcane Strike
skills.desc: Infused weapon attack, dealing magic damage to multiple enemies.

skills.name: Spell Ward
skills.desc: Magical defenses are enhanced, reducing incoming spell damage.

skills.name: Mana Shield
skills.desc: Generates a magical shield, absorbing incoming damage. Mana fueled.

skills.name: Battlemage's Focus
skills.desc: Harmonizes physical and magical prowess, boosting strength and intelligence.

skills.name: Disrupting Blade
skills.desc: Strikes with arcane energy, damaging and silencing enemy spellcasters.

skills.name: Shadow Strike
skills.desc: Emerges from shadows to strike, dealing huge damage and weakening foe.

skills.name: Fleet Footed
skills.desc: Moves with incredible speed, enhancing evasion and overall agility.

skills.name: Poisoned Shuriken
skills.desc: Hurls a poisoned shuriken, dealing damage and lingering poison over time.

skills.name: Vanish
skills.desc: Disappears from sight, becoming untargetable and empowering next strike.

skills.name: Critical Opening
skills.desc: Exploits weaknesses, increasing critical hit chance against debuffed foes.

skills.name: Heroic Strike
skills.desc: Unleashes a mighty blow, capable of crushing foes. For glory!

skills.name: Unyielding Spirit
skills.desc: Bolsters health and heals upon landing critical hits. Never gives up.

skills.name: Inspiring Presence
skills.desc: Inspires allies, granting them a temporary boost to attack power.

skills.name: Last Stand
skills.desc: Fights harder when gravely wounded, boosting defense and damage.

skills.name: Glorious Charge
skills.desc: Charges into battle, damaging an enemy and entering a powerful rage.

skills.name: Tactical Command
skills.desc: Issues a command, boosting an ally's next action. Strategic advantage.

skills.name: Resourceful
skills.desc: Optimizes resource acquisition, increasing gold rewards from combat.

skills.name: Rallying Cry
skills.desc: Inspires allies, providing a small burst of healing to all.

skills.name: Experienced Leader
skills.desc: Allies benefit from leadership, gaining a small stat boost. United!

skills.name: Emergency Funds
skills.desc: Provides immediate mana to an ally. For unexpected expenses!

skills.name: Divine Light
skills.desc: Bathes ally in divine light, restoring a large amount of health.

skills.name: Holy Smite
skills.desc: Strikes enemy with holy energy. Especially potent against unholy foes.

skills.name: Aura of Purity
skills.desc: Emits a purifying aura, occasionally cleansing allies of negative effects.

skills.name: Sacred Vigor
skills.desc: Enhances all healing received by allies. Blessings of restoration.

skills.name: Benediction
skills.desc: Blesses an ally, granting defense and immunity to debuffs temporarily.

skills.name: Molten Core
skills.desc: Core burns, increasing defense and granting minor health regeneration.

skills.name: Hammer of the Ancients
skills.desc: Unleashes a devastating blow, dealing massive damage with crushing force.

skills.name: Forged in Fire
skills.desc: Hardened by heat, permanently increasing strength and defense.

skills.name: Aegis of Ash
skills.desc: Summons an ash shield, healing self and boosting defense temporarily.

skills.name: Unbreakable Will
skills.desc: Enters a frenzy, gaining immense power and becoming enraged.
